title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.380 - Appeals, how taken
text:
426.380.  Appeals, how taken. — In any proceeding under this chapter, appeals may be taken from the judgment of the court in the same manner as appeals are now allowed by law from judgments of circuit courts in this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 5776, A. 1949 S.B. 1118) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5666; 1919 § 662; 1909 § 935
